name: PaySpace (Deel Local Payroll powered by PaySpace)

Compliance.description: SARS-listed payroll provider; POPIA-compliant; B-BBEE certified; BCEA/UIF/SDL/PAYE fully supported; no regulatory violations found.

Customer Satisfaction.description: G2 4.2/5; Capterra 4.3/5; praised for SA compliance, dedicated support; some complaints on UX/cost.

Product Value.description: Comprehensive SA payroll/HR; full statutory compliance; good value for SA businesses needing local compliance.

Innovation.description: Cloud-based; API integrations; Deel global payroll connection; advanced analytics; automated payslips/IRP5/EMP501.

Customer Support.description: Dedicated SA support team; praised for compliance assistance; some complaints on response times.

Accessibility & Security.description: Cloud with bank-level security; POPIA-compliant; role-based access; ISO standards; SA data hosting.

pricing.name: Pricing
pricing.cost: Pricing: Quote-based; typically R50-200/emp/mo depending on modules; Deel integration available

socialSentiment.summary: SA businesses highly rate compliance capabilities; UX and pricing transparency concerns on review platforms.
